name: UTM
summary: Note: Valid ranges for #zone_number and #zone_letter are 1-60 and C-X (omitting I and O). Valid ranges for #x and #y are 100000-899999. The UTM class lets you work with UTM map coordinates.

constructors.name: initialize
constructors.summary: The #initialize method is used to create a new UTM coordinate. You will often create UTM objects by calling the method Sketchup::Model#point_to_utm instead of calling this method.
constructors.remarks: The #initialize method is used to create a new UTM coordinate. You will often create UTM objects by calling the method Sketchup::Model#point_to_utm instead of calling this method.

params.name: zone_number
params.doc: A zone number or a UTM object.

methods.name: to_a
methods.summary: The #to_a method returns a UTM coordinate as a 4 element array.
methods.remarks: The #to_a method returns a UTM coordinate as a 4 element array. The Array elements are the zone number, the zone letter, the x coordinate and the y coordinate.

methods.name: to_latlong
methods.summary: The #to_latlong method is used to convert UTM coordinates to latitude and longitude.
methods.remarks: The #to_latlong method is used to convert UTM coordinates to latitude and longitude. See the LatLong class for more information.

methods.name: to_s
methods.summary: The #to_s method is used to retrieve a string representation of a UTM.
methods.remarks: The #to_s method is used to retrieve a string representation of a UTM.

methods.name: x
methods.summary: The #x method returns the UTM x coordinate.
methods.remarks: The #x method returns the UTM x coordinate.

methods.name: y
methods.summary: The #y method returns the UTM y coordinate.
methods.remarks: The #y method returns the UTM y coordinate.

methods.name: zone_letter
methods.summary: The #zone_letter method returns the UTM zone letter.
methods.remarks: The #zone_letter method returns the UTM zone letter.

methods.name: zone_number
methods.summary: The #zone_number method returns the UTM zone number.
methods.remarks: The #zone_number method returns the UTM zone number.
